sessions.manage_sessions: Here you can manage your active sessions.
sessions.location_shown: Location shown is the general and not the exact position.
sessions.revoke_reason: Are you sure you want to revoke this session. This will sign you out on that device.

regulatory.age_assurance_description: To continue we are required by law to use highly effective age assurance to verify that you are 18 or older, in line with local law.
regulatory.choose_method_description: Below you can select from a number of age assurance methods.
regulatory.more_info: for more information on how we handle your data for age assurance.
regulatory.open_source_link: You can find more information about our facial age estimation tool here: https://github.com/doppeltilde/vision_classification
regulatory.set_age: Please set your age to continue.
regulatory.provider_age_not_available_description: Age information is not available, please use another method.
regulatory.provider_declined_user_description: You declined to share age information, please share or use another method.
regulatory.camera_face_scan_required: To complete your face scan, we need permission to use your front camera. Your photo is securely processed.
regulatory.app_needs_permission: Gelesen needs access to your camera to verify your age. Please grant access to the camera in your device settings.
regulatory.age_restricted_description: You are underage. You cannot use this feature.
regulatory.set_age_to_continue: Please set your age to continue.
regulatory.align_face: Align your face within the frame.

onboarding.please_select_at_least_one_topic: Please select at least one topic.
onboarding.what_would_you_like_to_be_called:
What would you like
to be called?
onboarding.which_topics_are_you_interested_in:
Which topics are you
interested in?
onboarding.this_will_not_limit_your_experience_in_g: This will not limit your experience in Gelesen and you can change this later.
onboarding.age_privacy_description: This will not be shown publicly. We ask for your age to make sure you only see content that is legally allowed and appropriate for your age, and to comply with regulations.

settings.sensitive_content_description: This will allow you to upload, search, and view user-generated content that is flagged as sensitive.
settings.logout_reason: Are you sure you want to logout?
settings.session_reason: Please authenticate to show your active sessions.
settings.edit_description: Edit profile picture, age, and more
settings.feedback_description: Have any feedback, suggestions, or just want to hang out? Join the Discord.

close_account.close_my_account_description:
We're sorry to hear that you're considering closing your account.

Please note that once your account is closed, you will loose access to the service.

This action is irreversible, and we cannot return your account!
close_account.close_my_account_step_1_description: Are you sure you want to close your account?
close_account.close_my_account_step_2_description: To continue with the closure process, please confirm by entering the phrase 'CLOSE MY ACCOUNT' below:
close_account.close_my_account_step_3_description:
ARE YOU SURE ABOUT THAT?

Once you tap on ”YES, CLOSE ACCOUNT NOW”, you will lose access to the service.

This action is irreversible, and we cannot return your account!

login.title: Get started with Gelesen
login.sign_in_description:
Create chat stories
and share them with others.
login.agreement_description: By continuing, you confirm that you have read and agree to the End User License Agreement (EULA), Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Community Guidelines.
login.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
login.unsupported_email_provider: This email provider is not supported.
login.email_code: Please enter the code sent to your email address: {email}
login.account_not_found: Account was either not found or has been closed.

create.no_stories_created: You haven't created any stories yet. Start by creating your first story!
create.title: Title
create.published_description: Published stories are publicly visible to other users.
create.private_description: Private stories are only visible to you.
create.scrap_story_description: Are you sure you want to scrap this story?
create.existing_cloud_saves_description: It looks like you have existing cloud saves, do you want to download them?
create.no_scenes_found:
No scenes found.
Tap on the + to add a new one.
create.sacred_timeline_description: The sacred timeline is marked in yellow and is the default path the story follows if there are no branches.
create.minimap_description: The minimap provides a bird's-eye view of your entire story, making it easy to navigate and understand the overall structure.
create.zoom_controls_description: If the zoom controls should be shown.

scene.title: Title
scene.title_description: A heading for a scene section, hinting at its content.
scene.chat_description: A conversation between one or more characters.
scene.interlude_description: A short segment that breaks up the main narrative.

chat.no_messages_found:
No messages found.
Tap on the + to add a new one.
chat.no_choices_found:
No choices found.
Tap on the + to add a new one.
chat.no_conversations_found:
No conversations found.
Tap on the + to add a new one.
chat.copy_message_confirm: Are you sure you want to create a copy of this message?
chat.delete_message_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this message?

tutorial.new_messages_description: By tapping here you can create messages for characters you want to be added.
tutorial.new_actions_description: ”Actions” are the building blocks with which you can customize and personalize this scene.
tutorial.play_test_description: Tapping here will allow you to playtest this scene.
tutorial.continue_description: Once you have familiarized yourself a bit with the ”Chat Creator” tap here to continue.

dialogue.delete_dialogue_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this dialogue?

actions.inline_comment_description: Shows a block of text inline with the conversation.
actions.change_background_description: Swaps the backdrop image of the scene.
actions.fullscreen_comment_description: Shows a block of text in a fullscreen dialogue.
actions.change_chat_buddy_description: Switch the currently talking chat receiver.
actions.sound_description: Triggers a sound effect or a continuous ambient audio track.
actions.background_color_description: Change the scene backdrop background color.
actions.none_description: No specific change; effectively does nothing.
actions.delay_description: Adds a delay before continuing the conversation.
actions.info_banner_description: Shows a brief floating popup with text.
actions.haptic_feedback_description: Triggers the device to play a tactile feedback vibration.
actions.change_custom_variables_description: Dynamically modifies the specified global or local variable.
actions.change_character_stats_description: Dynamically modifies the specified characters stats.
actions.glitch_effect_description: Simulates digital corruption, signal loss, or cybernetic distortion.
actions.character_name_change_description: Allows the user to rename a specified character.
actions.end_chapter_description: Will end the current scene, before reaching the conversation end.
actions.go_to_scene_description: Will end the current scene, and take the player to the specified scene.
actions.go_to_message_description: Will jump to the specified dialogue.
actions.conditional_statements_description: Represents a logical branch point in the conversation flow.
